tweet.text: RT @indhssports: Zionsville QB Zachary Trent to Eugene Hilton Jr for the TD. Eagles tripped up by Pike 31-20 ⁦@ZionsvilleFB⁩ ⁦@ZCSeagles⁩ ⁦…

RT @badgers_insider: He is him! Badger Commit Eugene Hilton had himself a day!
#Wisconsin #Badgers https://t.co/vLtzvfV5Nv

RT @TomMarronPhoto: Down by 2, 4th and 17 on the 32 with 17.6 to go in the game.
Fans: What are we going to do?
Eugene: I got you. https:…
RT @TomMarronPhoto: It's like he can't help himself, he just keeps getting in the end-zone. https://t.co/0xjxqtkn2b
RT @ZVFB_video: 4th and 17 with 0:17 to go in the game and we are down. I think @EugeneHiltonJr might be living his best life. Note the lin…
